name: Granny Smith Chocolate Oatmeal Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a large bowl until frothy.
2. Mix together sugar, flour, cinnamon and salt in a small bowl. Stir into eggs until blended. Add butter, corn syrup and vanilla; mix well. Fold in oats, apples and chocolate chips. Spoon filling into pie shell.
3. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven until the pie is set, about 1 hour and 10 minutes. Let cool before cutting.
